name: whoimet
description: Snap a photo of the person you just met, share one link, and when they open it and register you're connected on Hi — both ways. A self-contained web app: the photo uploads to your Hi profile, the link carries your live card, and registration opens a conversation plus a friend request between you. No cold outreach, no scraping, no face recognition — the person becomes a connection only because they chose to open your link and sign up.
